infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: CivicPulse needs your location to show nearby issues and accurately pin new reports.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: CivicPulse needs camera access to attach photos to issue reports.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: CivicPulse needs photo library access to attach images to issue reports.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: CivicPulse needs your location to show nearby issues and pin new reports.

plugins.photosPermission: CivicPulse needs photo access to attach images to issue reports.
plugins.cameraPermission: CivicPulse needs camera access to photograph issues.
